scaled_oracle_cases.description: Updated seed case to include edge-case read IDs with many separators, empty field, and different separator, strengthening verification coverage.
scaled_oracle_cases.semantic_intent: Verify that the function correctly extracts the last two fields under various edge cases including many separators, empty fields, and non-default separators.
scaled_oracle_cases.target_constraint: The function must always take the last two fields after splitting by the given separator, handle empty fields gracefully, raise ValueError for fewer than two separators, and work with non-default separators.
scaled_oracle_cases.expected_failure_mode: A naive implementation that assumes exactly two separators, hardcodes the separator, or fails on empty fields would fail.
scaled_oracle_cases.setup_code:
read_id_good = 'NB551068:51:H3JTYBGXX:1:11101:10000:1001_CB10123_UMIACTGGA'
read_id_bad = 'NB551068:51:H3JTYBGXX:1:11101:10000:1001'
read_id_many = 'prefix_a_b_c_d_e_f'
read_id_empty = 'prefix_CB123_'
read_id_pipe = 'prefix|CB456|UMIxyz'
sep_default = '_'
sep_pipe = '|'
scaled_oracle_cases.call_code:
umi, cell_barcode = get_cell_umi_read_string(read_id_good, sep_default)
print("Good read -> UMI bytes:", umi, "Cell barcode bytes:", cell_barcode)
try:
    get_cell_umi_read_string(read_id_bad, sep_default)
except ValueError as e:
    print("Expected error for bad read ID:", e)

# Edge case: many separators
umi_many, cb_many = get_cell_umi_read_string(read_id_many, sep_default)
print("Many separators -> UMI bytes:", umi_many, "Cell barcode bytes:", cb_many)

# Edge case: empty field
umi_empty, cb_empty = get_cell_umi_read_string(read_id_empty, sep_default)
print("Empty field -> UMI bytes:", umi_empty, "Cell barcode bytes:", cb_empty)

# Edge case: different separator
umi_pipe, cb_pipe = get_cell_umi_read_string(read_id_pipe, sep_pipe)
print("Different separator -> UMI bytes:", umi_pipe, "Cell barcode bytes:", cb_pipe)

result = {'umi': umi, 'cell_barcode': cell_barcode}
covered_requirements: Strengthen verification by adding edge-case read IDs with varying separator occurrences, empty fields, and non-standard separators.
Increase oracle and verification strength through more executable, semantically targeted case coverage.

stdout_contains: Good read -> UMI bytes: b'UMIACTGGA' Cell barcode bytes: b'CB10123'
Expected error for bad read ID: Could not extract UMI or CB from the read ID, pleasecheck UMI and CB are encoded in the read name:NB551068:51:H3JTYBGXX:1:11101:10000:1001
Many separators -> UMI bytes: b'f' Cell barcode bytes: b'e'
Empty field -> UMI bytes: b'' Cell barcode bytes: b'CB123'
Different separator -> UMI bytes: b'UMIxyz' Cell barcode bytes: b'CB456'
